topics.name: Data Engineering
topics.description: Creating data repositories for ML, identifying and implementing data ingestion solutions, and implementing data transformation solutions.

subtopics.name: Data Repositories for ML
subtopics.description: Understanding AWS storage services for machine learning workloads, including S3, RDS, DynamoDB, Redshift, and other data storage solutions optimized for ML workflows.
keyPoints: S3 for large-scale data storage and data lakes
Differences between Data Lakes and Data Warehouses
Amazon SageMaker Feature Store for ML feature management

subtopics.name: Data Ingestion Solutions
subtopics.description: Implementing data ingestion pipelines using AWS services like Kinesis, Glue, and Data Pipeline for batch and streaming data.
keyPoints: Amazon Kinesis for real-time data streaming
AWS Data Pipeline for workflow orchestration

subtopics.name: Data Transformation
subtopics.description: Transforming and preparing data for ML using AWS services and best practices.
keyPoints: AWS Glue DataBrew for visual data preparation
Apache Spark on EMR for large-scale transformations

topics.name: Exploratory Data Analysis
topics.description: Sanitizing and preparing data for modeling, performing feature engineering, and analyzing and visualizing datasets for ML.

subtopics.name: Data Preparation and Cleaning
subtopics.description: Techniques for cleaning, preprocessing, and preparing data for machine learning models.

subtopics.name: Feature Engineering
subtopics.description: Creating and selecting features to improve model performance.

subtopics.name: Data Analysis and Visualization
subtopics.description: Analyzing and visualizing data using Amazon SageMaker, Jupyter notebooks, and other tools.

topics.name: Modeling
topics.description: Framing business problems as ML problems, selecting appropriate models, training and tuning models, and performing hyperparameter optimization.

subtopics.name: Model Selection
subtopics.description: Choosing the right algorithm and approach for different ML problems.

subtopics.name: Model Training
subtopics.description: Training ML models using Amazon SageMaker and other AWS services.

subtopics.name: Hyperparameter Optimization
subtopics.description: Optimizing model performance through systematic hyperparameter tuning.
